query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 1. wa_conversations — Thread canônico de conversa WhatsApp
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_conversations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  sessionId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  contactId INT NULL,
  remoteJid VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  conversationKey VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  phoneE164 VARCHAR(32),
  phoneDigits VARCHAR(32),
  phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16),
  lastMessageAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  lastMessagePreview TEXT,
  lastMessageType VARCHAR(32),
  lastFromMe BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  lastStatus VARCHAR(32),
  unreadCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('open','pending','resolved','closed') DEFAULT 'open' NOT NULL,
  contactPushName VARCHAR(128),
  mergedIntoId INT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_conversation_key (tenantId, conversationKey),
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_session (tenantId, sessionId, lastMessageAt),
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_contact (tenantId, contactId),
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_jid (tenantId, sessionId, remoteJid),
  INDEX idx_wc_phone (tenantId, phoneE164),
  INDEX idx_wc_merged (mergedIntoId)
);

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 2. wa_identities — Mapeia identidades WhatsApp para contacts
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_identities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  sessionId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  contactId INT NULL,
  remoteJid VARCHAR(128),
  waId VARCHAR(128),
  phoneE164 VARCHAR(32),
  confidenceScore INT DEFAULT 60,
  firstSeenAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastSeenAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_identity_jid (sessionId, remoteJid),
  INDEX idx_wi_tenant_session (tenantId, sessionId),
  INDEX idx_wi_contact (tenantId, contactId),
  INDEX idx_wi_phone (tenantId, phoneE164)
);

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 3. wa_audit_log — Log de auditoria para resolver
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  entityType VARCHAR(64),
  entityId VARCHAR(128),
  inputsJson JSON,
  outputsJson JSON,
  correlationId VARCHAR(64),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_wal_tenant_action (tenantId, action, createdAt),
  INDEX idx_wal_correlation (correlationId)
);

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 4. Adicionar FK waConversationId em deals e messages
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ALTER TABLE deals ADD COLUMN waConversationId INT NULL;
ALTER TABLE deals ADD INDEX idx_deals_wa_conv (waConversationId);

ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN waConversationId INT NULL;
ALTER TABLE messages ADD INDEX idx_msg_wa_conv (waConversationId);

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 5. Adicionar phoneE164 e phoneDigits em contacts
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN phoneE164 VARCHAR(32) NULL;
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN phoneDigits VARCHAR(32) NULL;
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16) NULL;
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD INDEX idx_contacts_phone_e164 (tenantId, phoneE164);

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- 6. Unique constraint em messages para idempotência
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Already has index msg_session_jid_idx, add unique on messageId per session
-- (messageId can be null for old messages, so we can't make it strictly unique)

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN phoneE164 VARCHAR(32) NULL;

ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16) NULL;
